author: Michael Liedtke, The Associated Press
title: Yahoo CEO Jim Lanzone on ‘the white whale of turnarounds’ and turning to AI—licensed from Anthropic
description: The AP asked Scout about Yahoo's history: "Yahoo’s journey illustrates how a company with an early advantage can disappear without continuous innovation."
content: Internet trailblazer Yahoo is exploring technologys next frontier with Scout, an answer engine powered by artificial intelligence. Scout seems insightful, based on its response to a question posed by… [+6097 chars]

author: Shawn Tully
title: Some cried. Others were speechless. How front-line workers walked away with checks averaging $240,000 when KKR sold their company
description: They knew they were getting a payout. But employees at CoolIT had no idea just how much they'd profit from KKR's sale of their employer.
content: It was showtime for the employees of CoolIT.In the late afternoon of March 25th, as an unexpected snowstorm blanketed Calgary, Canada, around 600 mainly front-line workers of CoolIT Systems gathered … [+16630 chars]
